VoxAtlas
========

VoxAtlas is a feature extraction engine for conversational speech.

The documentation follows an MNE-style layout: API reference pages are
generated from docstrings, algorithm details live next to the extractor code,
and tutorials show end-to-end usage patterns.

Getting Started
---------------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   getting_started/installation
   getting_started/minimal_example

Overview
--------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   overview/architecture
   overview/pipeline
   overview/unit_hierarchy
   overview/feature_system

---------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1

   tutorials/acoustic_features
   tutorials/linguistic_features
   tutorials/conversational_features
   tutorials/building_features

.. toctree::
